description_long: This object is a classic saber-style sword featuring a gently curved, single-edged blade with a dark metallic finish. The hilt is equipped with a prominent knuckle guard made of gold or brass, forming a protective loop around the hand. The handle is cylindrical, dark brown, and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, with subtle grooves and a rounded pommel. The blade is long and slender, tapering to a fine point, and the overall design suggests both elegance and functionality. The guard and handle have a polished, metallic sheen, contrasting with the matte blade. No visible ornamentation or engravings are present, giving the sword a utilitarian yet refined appearance.
description: A curved, single-edged saber with a dark blade, gold knuckle guard, and a textured brown handle. The design is elegant and functional, with a polished metallic hilt.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the tip, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the rounded handle end.
description_view_1: The full length of the curved blade is visible, along with the gold knuckle guard and detailed handle.
description_view_2: A top-down view highlights the slim blade and the cylindrical, grooved handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the sword, mirroring view 1, with the blade curve and guard clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark brown, grooved, with a rounded pommel and gold knuckle guard
